title: Task 01: Нейтральные mention-типы, registry и normalizer
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-01-neutral-mentions.md. Implement only Task 01: create apps/www/src/lib/mentions with neutral EntityMentionType, EntityMentionTarget, SiteMentionRegistry, NormalizedEntityMentions; move parser/normalizer behavior from people/mentions.ts into generic app-level layer; keep people/mentions.ts as thin adapter/re-export; cover duplicate slug, unknown slug, case, labelled mention, invalid labelled case, and per-body dedupe behavior. Run focused tests from the task file plus typecheck. Required skills: api-and-interface-design, test-driven-development, code-simplification.

title: Task 02: App markdown pipeline и self-link validation
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-02-markdown-pipeline.md. Implement only Task 02: update RenderSiteMarkdownOptions to use a generic mentions option with SiteMentionRegistry and optional source_entity; make PreprocessedSiteMarkdown.mentions return EntityMentionTarget[]; wire preprocessSiteMarkdown/renderMarkdown to the neutral normalizer; update news, status, and people loaders/schemas to pass and expose generic mention targets; pass source_entity for people profile body; add normalization-time self-link errors for canonical and labelled mentions. Do not change PersonBacklinks shape or implement source-ref graph migration. Run the focused tests from the task file plus typecheck. Required skills: api-and-interface-design, test-driven-development, astro, code-simplification.

title: Task 03: Source refs adapters для news, status и people
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-03-source-ref-adapters.md. Implement only Task 03: add neutral EntityMentionSourceRef in apps/www/src/lib/mentions; add source ref adapters and focused tests for news articles, status incidents, and people profiles; refs must include target_type/target_slug, source_section/source_kind/source_id, title, html_url, markdown_url, optional excerpt, mentioned_at, sort_key, and dedupe repeated targets within one source unit. Do not switch buildPeopleGraphDataset to the new refs unless needed, do not change public people backlinks shape, and do not implement Task 04 graph migration. Run the focused tests from the task file plus typecheck. Required skills: api-and-interface-design, test-driven-development, code-simplification.

title: Task 04: Generic mention graph и миграция people backlinks
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-04-generic-graph.md. Implement only Task 04: add a generic EntityMentionGraph over readonly EntityMentionSourceRef[]; index refs by target_type + target_slug; group refs by source_section; dedupe repeated refs from one source unit to one target; sort refs by sort_key desc, then title with ru collation, then source_id; fail defensively on source_entity self-link refs; migrate buildPeopleGraphDataset/buildPeopleDataWithBacklinks to use source adapters and the generic graph while preserving the public PersonBacklinks shape. Do not add public generic endpoints or feeds and do not change people backlink UI. Run the focused checks from the task file plus typecheck. Required skills: api-and-interface-design, test-driven-development, code-simplification.

title: Task 05: Cleanup доменных границ и документации
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-05-cleanup-docs.md. Implement only Task 05: review remaining people-only coupling after Task 04, verify render.ts uses generic mention layer, verify news/status no longer depend on people-only mention registry or target types for body mentions, verify people/mentions.ts is only a thin adapter, verify people/load.ts no longer owns news/status backlink ref construction, remove dead temporary aliases if no longer needed, and update apps/www/AGENTS.md People Mentions / agent-facing docs to match the generic app-level mention layer. Do not rewrite docs for style, do not add Markdown tables, do not change user-facing site text, and do not modify ADR-012 unless an actual decision changed. Run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck. Required skills: code-review-and-quality, code-simplification, documentation-and-adrs.

title: Task 06: Финальная регрессия и hardening
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-06-final-regression.md. Implement only Task 06 final regression: read ADR-012 context, ADR, apps/www instructions, and all task files; verify previous task files/checklists and recent commits; perform targeted grep for people-only mention leakage, forbidden backlinks coupling, and forbidden low-level markdown rendering; run final code review with code-review-and-quality; fix only minimal regressions if found; run pnpm test, pnpm typecheck, and pnpm build; update task-06 checklist/status and commit with message 'Verify entity mention graph implementation'. Required skills: code-review-and-quality; diagnose if checks fail; code-simplification if code changes.

title: Task 07: Защитить linkDestinationOffsets от URL-encoded символов
description: Artifact: docs/decisions/012-entity-mention-graph/task-07-label-mention-url-encoding.md. Implement only Task 07: investigate how remark-parse represents labelled mention destinations with URL-encoded or Unicode characters; harden apps/www/src/lib/mentions/normalize.ts linkDestinationOffsets so replacement boundaries match the original Markdown URL span, or fail with a clear defensive error if an unsupported boundary is detected; update focused mention tests as required. Do not change mention syntax, do not add mention-enabled surfaces, and do not move logic into @shelkovo/markdown. Run pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www test -- src/lib/mentions and pnpm --filter @shelkovo/www typecheck. Required skills: test-driven-development, code-simplification.
